notes: Source: docs/ghl-reference/acquisitions/acquisitions-opportunities.csv. Primary pipeline for seller leads. Bird-Dog Triage and Equity Exit pipelines are secondary — author manually in GHL UI after primary lifecycle is live (the provisioner v1 only creates one pipeline per run; re-run with a different config to add more, or build manually).

stages.name: New Lead
stages.trigger_event: lead-new tag applied (form submission or manual)

stages.name: Triaged
stages.fires_workflow: Branches: hot (35+) → uw-requested; warm (20-34) → nurture; cold → manual

stages.name: Under Contract
stages.fires_workflow: Optional: hand-off notification to TFS / Dispo Buddy

stages.name: Funded
stages.trigger_event: Operator advances after closing at title
